channel.title: andeng.mariee TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from andeng.mariee

item.title: This was the sweetest reaction 😆🌹 Trading roses for smiles this Valentines Day ☺️💚
item.description: This was the sweetest reaction 😆🌹 Trading roses for smiles this Valentines Day ☺️💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: The people of Negros Oriental are so beautiful and kind. Yes- I was giving out roses for Valentines, but I was the one to receive the most. Your smiles , kindness and love was the best gift I could have asked for. I was really not alone this Valentines be
item.description: The people of Negros Oriental are so beautiful and kind. Yes- I was giving out roses for Valentines, but I was the one to receive the most. Your smiles , kindness and love was the best gift I could have asked for. I was really not alone this Valentines be
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Even if Valentine’s Day is over.. will you be mine? 🥹🌹💚 #sleeptoken #ladyrider #kawasaki #motorcycle
item.description: Even if Valentine’s Day is over.. will you be mine? 🥹🌹💚 #sleeptoken #ladyrider #kawasaki #motorcycle
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Why are you running? Best boomba reactions 😅🤭💚
item.description: Why are you running? Best boomba reactions 😅🤭💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Next Chapter: Bacolod City 💚 Calling this place home for a few months. Thank you for such a warm welcome City of Smiles ☺️
item.description: Next Chapter: Bacolod City 💚 Calling this place home for a few months. Thank you for such a warm welcome City of Smiles ☺️
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Bacolod welcomed me with rain, I heard that’s a blessing 🙏🏽💚
item.description: Bacolod welcomed me with rain, I heard that’s a blessing 🙏🏽💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Goodmorning 💚
item.description: Goodmorning 💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: That moment when it starts to rain when riding motor 😅 I think this is the current breakdown of the languages I can speak : 85% English , 10%Bisaya, 7% Tagalog, 3% Hiligaynon . More practice needed haha 🤣@spicymiaph
item.description: That moment when it starts to rain when riding motor 😅 I think this is the current breakdown of the languages I can speak : 85% English , 10%Bisaya, 7% Tagalog, 3% Hiligaynon . More practice needed haha 🤣@spicymiaph
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Everyone’s timeline is different 💚 There’s no right or wrong. No early or late in life. All I know is I’m really enjoying this chapter so far… and I’m so happy you’re all a part of it 🥹💚
item.description: Everyone’s timeline is different 💚 There’s no right or wrong. No early or late in life. All I know is I’m really enjoying this chapter so far… and I’m so happy you’re all a part of it 🥹💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Throttle therapy makes all the problems go away 💚 Feeling great in my new helmet from @Gille Helmets PH
item.description: Throttle therapy makes all the problems go away 💚 Feeling great in my new helmet from @Gille Helmets PH
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: First Bacolod Motovlog 🥹💚 It’s really true, Bacolod is the City of Smiles ☺️
item.description: First Bacolod Motovlog 🥹💚 It’s really true, Bacolod is the City of Smiles ☺️

item.title: Bacolod has shown me so much love 🥹💚 Thank you so much.

item.title: Do you want this POV? Accepting applications… send your resume via email for screening 🤣

item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Gas prices are high, this is my new sideline 🤭 I’ll just use my big bike to make extra fast grab deliveries 😅💚
item.description: Gas prices are high, this is my new sideline 🤭 I’ll just use my big bike to make extra fast grab deliveries 😅💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Gas prices may be high in the Philippines, but kindness can be higher. Let’s give a little cash and sweet treat to the hardworking drivers during this tough time. Salute to you all 🫡💚
item.description: Gas prices may be high in the Philippines, but kindness can be higher. Let’s give a little cash and sweet treat to the hardworking drivers during this tough time. Salute to you all 🫡💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Good evening La Carlota ! Happy 43rd Pasalamat Festival 💚 Thank you for the warm welcome ☺️ #ladyrider #zx4rr #boomba #motorcycle #lacarlota

item.title: Things that are here to stay 💚 We hit 400k across all platforms today 🥹 One thing I promise is that my morals, character, and integrity will never change no matter how many followers I have. And I truly believe the people who follow me carry those same va
item.description: Things that are here to stay 💚 We hit 400k across all platforms today 🥹 One thing I promise is that my morals, character, and integrity will never change no matter how many followers I have. And I truly believe the people who follow me carry those same va
item.author: andeng.mariee
